title: SWEny Skill
description: A composable tool bundle that provides capabilities to workflow nodes.

id.description: Unique skill identifier. Referenced by nodes' 'skills' arrays.

category.description: Functional category for grouping and validation.

config.description: Configuration fields required by this skill.

tools.description: Tools this skill provides to nodes.

description.description: Human-readable description of this config field.

required.description: Whether this field must be provided for the skill to function.

env.description: Default environment variable to read this value from.

name.description: Tool name. Must be unique within the skill.

description.description: What this tool does. Provided to the AI model for tool selection.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema defining the tool's input parameters.
